evals.name: basic-threading-workflow
evals.prompt: Show me how to send an email and then reply to it maintaining the thread using Resend. I need to send an initial email to a client, and when they reply, I want to send back a response that appears in the same Gmail thread.
evals.expected_output: Code example showing: 1) Sending initial email with Message-ID header, 2) Handling webhook with message_id from reply, 3) Sending threaded reply with In-Reply-To and References headers

evals.name: webhook-handler-threading
evals.prompt: I need a Next.js webhook handler that receives emails from Resend and sends a threaded auto-reply. When someone emails support@mycompany.com, I want to immediately reply with 'Thanks for your email, we'll respond within 24 hours' and have it appear threaded in their inbox.
evals.expected_output: Complete Next.js webhook handler that: 1) Verifies webhook signature, 2) Extracts message_id from email.received event, 3) Sends threaded auto-reply with proper headers

evals.name: conversation-tracking
evals.prompt: How do I track email conversations with Resend? I want to send emails to clients and when they reply, be able to look up the original conversation and send a properly threaded response that references all previous emails.
evals.expected_output: Solution showing: 1) Database schema for storing conversations with Message-IDs, 2) Function to build References chain from conversation history, 3) Example of sending reply with complete References header

assertions.description: Joins Message-IDs with space separator for References

evals.name: quoted-reply-formatting
evals.prompt: I need to send a threaded email reply with quoted text from the original message. When I reply to a client's email, I want to include their original message indented below my response, similar to how Gmail does it.
evals.expected_output: Code showing: 1) HTML formatting for quoted reply with border-left styling, 2) Text version with '>' quoted lines, 3) Proper threading headers
